mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in unemployment rate signals a weakening labor market, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in housing starts signals a strengthening demand side, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A joint increase in federal funds rate and decline in consumer price index signals a tightening monetary cycle, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS > 4.5% and CPIAUCSL declines > 0.5pp in 2 months
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in industrial production signals a weakening supply side, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: A joint increase in real personal consumption expenditures and decline in unemployment rate signals a strengthening demand side, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS increases > 1% in 2 months and UNRATE declines > 0.2pp in 1 month
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in payroll employment signals a strengthening labor market, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20-day returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite positive signal.

mechanism_narrative: A joint increase in GDP and decline in federal funds rate signals a strengthening demand side, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 increases > 1% in 2 quarters and FEDFUNDS declines > 0.5pp in 2 months
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
